name: @intentsolutionsio/rest-api-generator
description: Generate RESTful APIs from schemas with proper routing, validation, and documentation

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install rest-api-generator\\n  or /plugin install rest-api-generator@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
